

Graph Interface API Reference

This page documents the Graphs.jl AbstractGraph interface methods implemented by Network.jl. These functions allow Network objects to work seamlessly with the entire Graphs.jl algorithm library.

Basic Properties

nv

Graphs.nv — Function
nv(net::Network) -> Int

Return the number of vertices in the network.

source

ne

Graphs.ne — Function
ne(net::Network) -> Int

Return the number of edges in the network. For undirected networks, each edge is counted once.

source

vertices

Graphs.vertices — Function
vertices(net::Network) -> iterator

Return an iterator over all vertices.

source

edges

Graphs.edges — Function
edges(net::Network) -> iterator

Return an iterator over all edges.

source

has_vertex

Graphs.has_vertex — Function
has_vertex(net::Network, v) -> Bool

Check if vertex v exists in the network.

source

has_edge

Graphs.has_edge — Function
has_edge(net::Network, i, j) -> Bool

Check if edge (i, j) exists in the network.

source

is_directed

Graphs.is_directed — Function
is_directed(net::Network) -> Bool

Check if the network is directed.

source

is_bipartite

Network.is_bipartite — Function
is_bipartite(net::Network) -> Bool

Check if the network is bipartite (two-mode).

source

Vertex Modification

add_vertex!

Graphs.SimpleGraphs.add_vertex! — Function
add_vertex!(net::Network) -> Bool

Add a new vertex to the network. Returns true if successful.

source

add_vertices!

Network.add_vertices! — Function
add_vertices!(net::Network, n::Int) -> Int

Add n new vertices to the network. Returns the number of vertices added.

source

rem_vertex!

Graphs.SimpleGraphs.rem_vertex! — Function
rem_vertex!(net::Network, v) -> Bool

Remove vertex v from the network. Returns true if successful. Note: This will also remove all edges incident to v and update vertex attributes.

source

Edge Modification

add_edge!

Graphs.SimpleGraphs.add_edge! — Function
add_edge!(net::Network, i, j) -> Bool

Add edge (i, j) to the network. Returns true if successful. For undirected networks, also adds (j, i).

source
add_edge!(net::Network, i, j, attrs::Dict) -> Bool

Add edge with attributes.

source

add_edges!

Network.add_edges! — Function
add_edges!(net::Network, edges) -> Int

Add multiple edges. Returns the number of edges added.

source

rem_edge!

Graphs.SimpleGraphs.rem_edge! — Function
rem_edge!(net::Network, i, j) -> Bool

Remove edge (i, j) from the network. Returns true if successful.

source

Neighbors

neighbors

Graphs.neighbors — Function
neighbors(net::Network, v) -> iterator

Return neighbors of vertex v. For directed networks, returns outgoing neighbors.

source

inneighbors

Graphs.inneighbors — Function
inneighbors(net::Network, v) -> iterator

Return incoming neighbors of vertex v.

source

outneighbors

Graphs.outneighbors — Function
outneighbors(net::Network, v) -> iterator

Return outgoing neighbors of vertex v.

source

Utility Functions

network_size

Network.network_size — Function
network_size(net::Network) -> Int

Return the number of vertices. Alias for nv() to match R's network.size().

source

network_edgecount

Network.network_edgecount — Function
network_edgecount(net::Network) -> Int

Return the number of edges. Alias for ne() to match R's network.edgecount().

source

network_density

Network.network_density — Function
network_density(net::Network) -> Float64

Calculate network density (proportion of possible edges that exist).

source

get_neighborhood

Network.get_neighborhood — Function
get_neighborhood(net::Network, v, order::Int=1) -> Set

Get the neighborhood of vertex v up to the specified order (distance).

source

get_induced_subgraph

Network.get_induced_subgraph — Function
get_induced_subgraph(net::Network, vlist) -> Network

Create a new network containing only the specified vertices and edges between them.

source

permute_vertices

Network.permute_vertices — Function
permute_vertices(net::Network, perm::Vector) -> Network

Create a new network with vertices permuted according to the given permutation.

source
